page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance features 8 dedicated physical cores running at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz with 1 thread per core. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The CPU configuration includes a 32 KB L1 data cache, 1.0 MB L2 cache, and a 32 MB L3 cache. It lacks local storage and dedicated GPU hardware.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates strong single-core CPU performance, scoring 3074.67 in stress-ng tests, which places it in the top 25% tier. Multi-core performance is moderate, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 12302.19. Memory bandwidth tests show average performance, yielding 607.06 GB/sec for cached small-block reads and 38.79 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads. Single-threaded gzip compression registers at 28.91 GB/sec, while multi-threaded bzip3 decompression reaches 52.42 GB/sec. Static web serving throughput is measured at 10.15 GB/sec.

The instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Because it lacks local storage, users must rely on external block storage volumes, which may introduce latency tradeoffs depending on the storage tier selected. The absence of a GPU limits its utility for hardware-accelerated tasks. However, its balanced resource profile and strong single-core performance make it highly cost-efficient for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application servers, microservices, and moderate database hosting.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor with 8 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture. Operating at 2.7 GHz, it provides 32.0 GB of RAM, resulting in a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying on external storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU capabilities, ranking in the top 25%, alongside average multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics. It delivers 10.15 GB/sec in static web serving throughput and 52.42 GB/sec in multi-threaded decompression. This resource profile makes the ecs.g8a.2xlarge highly suitable for general-purpose workloads, such as web serving, microservices, and application hosting, where balanced compute and memory are required without the need for local NVMe storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 8 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 32 GB RAM, and 4 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong single-core CPU performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.2xlarge features 8 dedicated AMD EPYC cores and 32 GB RAM, delivering strong single-core performance for general-purpose workloads.
tagline: An x86_64 virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC cores and a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio for general-purpose application hosting.
bullet_points: Powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor with 8 dedicated physical cores.
Equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core.
Strong single-core CPU performance ranking in the top 25% of benchmarks.
Baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps with no local storage or GPU.
Best suited for web serving, microservices, and general-purpose application hosting.
